title: Navrang
writer: Gajanan Digambar Madgulkar, Shantaram Rajaram Vankudre
plot: Diwakar is a poet and loves his wife Jamuna more than anything. But Jamuna feels that Diwakar lives in a fantasy world and is irresponsible in the real world. Diwakar creates a muse from his imagination, who looks exactly like his...
